items.name: Portfolio
items.description: Data portfolio showcasing end-to-end data pipelines and machine learning frameworks. Includes a BeautifulSoup IPL web scraper, data analytics models for Titanic survival rates, a heart disease prediction engine with 85% accuracy, and a deep learning CNN image classification system deployed via a local Flask web application.

items.name: AI-Driven-Cryptocurrency-Transaction-Analysis-for-Cybercrime-Intelligence
items.description: AI-powered framework for cryptocurrency transaction analysis and cybercrime intelligence, combining machine learning, graph neural networks, and behavioral analysis to support digital forensic investigations.

items.name: Hybrid-Text-Mining-and-Generative-AI-Framework-for-SQL-Injection-Attack-Detection-
items.description: This desktop GUI tool helps non-expert users detect SQL-injection attacks. It uses a hybrid framework, combining Machine Learning and Deep Learning models. Generative AI (LLM like Gemini) provides a crucial second opinion on potential attacks. The tool handles text processing (Bag-of-Words) and allows live prediction.

items.name: osca-agesense
items.description: Machine learning-powered senior citizen risk assessment and recommendation system for the Office of Senior Citizens Affairs (OSCA), Pagsanjan, Laguna. Aligned with the WHO Healthy Ageing Framework.

items.name: Machine-Learning-in-NeuroImaging

items.name: Research-on-Predictive-Lead-Scoring-for-Credit-Card-Cross-Selling-Using-Machine-Learning.
items.description: This study designed and validated a hybrid machine learning framework to optimize predictive lead scoring in the banking sector. The study integrated the K-Prototypes algorithm, efficiently processing mixed CRM attributes to generate a multidimensional latent variable (Cluster_Label).

items.name: Autogluon

items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting ICU mortality risk and patient length of stay using clinical and physiological data, with comprehensive EDA, feature engineering, model comparison, and predictive analytics.

items.description: This project developed an IoT and machine learning framework for residential energy management. Sensors and an ESP32 microcontroller were used to monitor occupancy, environmental conditions, and power consumption. The system automated appliance control, reduced energy waste, improved efficiency.

items.name: pose-based-human-activity-recognition
items.description: A modular Human Activity Recognition framework using 2D pose estimation. Includes skeleton normalization, feature engineering, multi-scale temporal windowing, and subject-independent evaluation with support for traditional machine learning and deep learning models.

items.description: A leakage-proof machine learning framework utilizing Scikit-Learn pipelines and tree-based ensembles to predict and stratify coronary artery disease risk with optimized clinical sensitivity.

Using ~410,000 historical loans from Bondora (2009-2024), this analysis develops a machine learning framework to predict loan defaults and optimize portfolio capital allocation strategies for investors operating under limited capital.

items.name: DETECTive-Machine-Learning-Based-ATPP
items.description: DETECTive: Automatic Test Pattern Prediction (ATPP) for Digital Circuits is a GNN and LSTM-based framework that predicts test patterns for stuck-at faults in gate-level circuits. By learning circuit topology and fault propagation paths, it enables fast and scalable ATPG without traditional backtracking.

items.description: A  scikit-learn-inspired machine learning framework for the Swift language

items.name: Electrolyte_Opt-DES
items.description: A physics-guided machine learning framework that treats electrical conductivity as the primary prediction target, with viscosity and density modelled as coupled properties, and then uses the resulting surrogate models inside a multi-objective optimisation workflow to find DES compositions that combine favourable electrolyte characteristics.

items.name: BeanML
items.description: A framework for creating machine learning models.

items.name: Solar_Advisor

Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: amazon-emr
items.description: Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: CCDR
items.description: OpenCDR is an open-source platform for exploring, interpreting, and extending the Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR) framework through complete state-space analysis, probabilistic interpretation, and continuous monotonic machine-learning models.

items.name: sepsis-sentinel
items.description: SepsisSentinel: An advanced clinical data science and machine learning framework for the early detection and forecasting of sepsis utilizing clinical datasets. Built with scalable data pipelines and predictive modeling.

items.name: Amorphous-Polymer-Electrolyte-Machine-Learning

Uses SMILES-derived molecular fingerprints and descriptors as chemically informed features, with model interpretability and feature attribution analyses to surface materials design insights.
